title: Accrued liability contributions; crediting to contingency account
doc_html:
§951.48.  Accrued liability contributions; crediting to contingency account

The accrued liability contribution shall be credited to the surplus and contingency account as soon as the accumulated reserves in the pension accumulation account equals the present value as actuarially computed and approved by the board of trustees.

Redesignated from R.S. 17:1078 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.

§951.48.  Accrued liability contributions; crediting to contingency account
